design_philosophy: A professional, tactical dark mode aesthetic suitable for audio engineering. Emphasizes high contrast, clean typography, and tactile UI elements like sliders and gauges. Focuses on data clarity and functional beauty.

screens.name: Boost
components: Circular Dial or Large Vertical Slider for Volume Boost (0-200%).
Circular Dial or Large Vertical Slider for Bass Boost (0-100%).
Toggle Switch: 8D Audio Effect with neon glow when active.
Demo Audio Player: Play/Pause button, progress bar, audio visualizer graphic.

screens.name: Equalizer
components: 10-Band Vertical Sliders: Frequencies from 60Hz to 16kHz. Smooth thumb, glowing track.
Preset Selector: Horizontal scrollable chips (Flat, Pop, Rock, Jazz, Classical, Bass, Vocal, Electronic, Custom).
Reset Button: Ghost button to reset EQ to Flat.

screens.name: dB Meter
components: Real-time Gauge: Half-circle or circular animated meter, colored dynamically (Green -> Yellow -> Red).
Current Value Display: Huge central dB number.
Stats Row: Peak, Avg, Min dB values.
Status Badge: Quiet, Normal, Loud, Dangerous (colored accordingly).
Action Button: Start/Stop Recording (Prominent red/white button).
Line Chart: Real-time or historical graph of dB over time.
History List: List of past recordings with duration, max dB, and average dB. Options to save/delete.

sliders.style: Thick track, large tactile thumb, active portion uses primary neon color.

buttons.primary: Solid background (Brand Primary), dark text, active scale-down animation.
buttons.secondary: Outline with border default, white text.
buttons.ghost: Transparent background, text secondary, slight opacity change on press.

cards.style: Neumorphic tactile or flat dark grey with subtle 1px border. Deep shadow.

bottom_tab_bar.style: Floating or fixed at bottom, translucent blur, active icon colored in neon brand, inactive in muted grey.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. Example: data-testid='boost-volume-slider'.

images.description: Dark music production interface, useful for subtle background if needed.

technical_notes.styling: StyleSheet or standard React Native styles (mimicking Tailwind where applicable)
